entities.name: PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS (PCV)
entities.description: A virus causing Peanut Clump disease in groundnuts, characterized by high symptom variability and spread via seeds and soil.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The host plant affected by the Peanut Clump Virus.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The broad region where Peanut Clump disease was initially localized.

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country in West Africa where PCV is widely distributed from the Senegal river to the Gambia frontier.

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: A country in West Africa where PCV was detected at an agricultural research station.

entities.name: CÔTE D'IVOIRE
entities.description: A country in West Africa where PCV was detected.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in West Africa where PCV was detected.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in West Africa where PCV was detected.

entities.name: BENIN
entities.description: A country in West Africa where PCV was detected.

entities.name: GAMBIA
entities.description: A country bordering Senegal where the distribution of PCV extends to the frontier.

entities.name: SEED TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process by which PCV is spread through seeds, contributing to the increase of the disease.

entities.name: INFECTED SOILS
entities.description: A factor contributing to the dissemination of the Peanut Clump Virus.

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: A classical symptom induced by PCV in groundnut plants.

entities.name: SMALL DARK GREEN LEAVES
entities.description: A foliar symptom induced by PCV in groundnut plants.

entities.name: LINE PATTERN
entities.description: A light leaf symptom induced by PCV in groundnut plants.

entities.name: SPECKING
entities.description: A light leaf symptom induced by PCV in groundnut plants.

entities.name: FOLIAR SYMPTOMS
entities.description: A variety of symptoms appearing on the leaves of groundnut plants infected by PCV.

entities.name: FIELD DIAGNOSIS
entities.description: The process of identifying PCV in the field, which is noted as being very difficult.
